claim: Combining phosphatidylinositide 3-kinase and MEK 1/2 inhibitors is ineffective at treating KRAS mutant tumors.

result.claim: Combining phosphatidylinositide 3-kinase and MEK 1/2 inhibitors is ineffective at treating KRAS mutant tumors.
result.reasoning: The claim states that combining phosphatidylinositide 3-kinase (PI3K) and MEK 1/2 inhibitors is ineffective at treating KRAS mutant tumors. However, evidence from paper 4961038, "Effective Use of PI3K and MEK Inhibitors to Treat Mutant K-Ras G12D and PIK3CA H1047R Murine Lung Cancers," directly refutes this. The abstract of paper 4961038 states that "when NVP-BEZ235 [a dual pan-PI3K and mTOR inhibitor] was combined with a mitogen-activated protein kinase kinase (MEK) inhibitor, ARRY-142886, there was marked synergy in shrinking these Kras-mutant cancers." This indicates that the combined treatment was effective, not ineffective, in KRAS mutant tumors. While paper 4962464 mentioned that combined inhibition of PI3K/AKT and MEK/ERK1/2 pathways did not result in significant tumor regression (Proposition 4), this finding was in the context of EML4-ALK fusion oncogene-driven tumors, not KRAS mutant tumors, making it irrelevant to the current claim.

evidence.text: Pharmacological inhibition of mitogen-activated protein kinase kinase (MEK) activates apoptosis but not cell-cycle arrest in the inducible mouse model.
evidence.source: Oncogenic NRAS signaling differentially regulates survival and proliferation in melanoma

evidence.text: Mouse lung cancers driven by mutant Kras did not substantially respond to single-agent NVP-BEZ235.
evidence.source: Effective Use of PI3K and MEK Inhibitors to Treat Mutant K-Ras G12D and PIK3CA H1047R Murine Lung Cancers

evidence.text: Somatic mutations activate phosphoinositide 3-kinase (PI3K) in the p110-alpha catalytic subunit encoded by PIK3CA.
evidence.source: Effective Use of PI3K and MEK Inhibitors to Treat Mutant K-Ras G12D and PIK3CA H1047R Murine Lung Cancers

evidence.text: In KRAS mutant tumors, PIK3CA mutation restores Cyclin D1 expression and G1/S cell cycle progression.
evidence.source: PIK3CA mutation uncouples tumor growth and Cyclin D1 regulation from MEK/ERK and mutant KRAS signaling

evidence.text: GPCR kinases (GRKs) curtail G-protein signaling.
evidence.source: Regulation of β-Adrenergic Receptor Signaling by S-Nitrosylation of G-Protein-Coupled Receptor Kinase 2

evidence.text: Combined inhibition of the PI3K/AKT and MEK/ERK1/2 pathways did not result in significant tumor regression.
evidence.source: Inhibition of ALK, PI3K/MEK, and HSP90 in Murine Lung Adenocarcinoma Induced by EML4-ALK Fusion Oncogene

evidence.text: Germline mutations in the CHEK2 kinase gene have been associated with a range of cancer types.
evidence.source: A large germline deletion in the Chek2 kinase gene is associated with an increased risk of prostate cancer

evidence.text: Re-expression of mutant PIK3CA reinstates the resistance to MEK inhibition.
evidence.source: PIK3CA mutation uncouples tumor growth and Cyclin D1 regulation from MEK/ERK and mutant KRAS signaling

evidence.text: S3 inhibited 6PGD, cancer cell proliferation and tumor growth.
evidence.source: 6-phosphogluconate dehydrogenase links oxidative PPP, lipogenesis and tumor growth by inhibiting LKB1-AMPK signaling

evidence.text: NVP-BEZ235 inhibited the proliferation of HER2-amplified BT474 cells exogenously expressing mutations that render them resistant to trastuzumab.
evidence.source: NVP-BEZ235, a dual PI3K/mTOR inhibitor, prevents PI3K signaling and inhibits the growth of cancer cells with activating PI3K mutations.

evidence.text: Inhibition of HDAC6 activity using a clinically applicable small-molecule inhibitor significantly improved the survival of mice bearing ARID1A-mutated tumours.
evidence.source: ARID1A-mutated ovarian cancers depend on HDAC6 activity

evidence.text: NVP-BEZ235 was combined with a mitogen-activated protein kinase kinase (MEK) inhibitor ARRY-142886.
evidence.source: Effective Use of PI3K and MEK Inhibitors to Treat Mutant K-Ras G12D and PIK3CA H1047R Murine Lung Cancers

evidence.text: Physcion inhibited 6PGD, cancer cell proliferation and tumor growth.
evidence.source: 6-phosphogluconate dehydrogenase links oxidative PPP, lipogenesis and tumor growth by inhibiting LKB1-AMPK signaling

evidence.text: Phosphatidylinositol 3-kinase (PI3K) inhibition selectively killed CD44v6 CR-CSCs.
evidence.source: CD44v6 is a marker of constitutive and reprogrammed cancer stem cells driving colon cancer metastasis.

evidence.text: The ALK kinase inhibitor TAE684 produced greater tumor regression and improved overall survival compared with carboplatin and paclitaxel in the genetically engineered mouse model.
evidence.source: Inhibition of ALK, PI3K/MEK, and HSP90 in Murine Lung Adenocarcinoma Induced by EML4-ALK Fusion Oncogene

evidence.text: Phosphatidylinositol-3-kinase (PI3K) pathway deregulation is a common event in human cancer.
evidence.source: NVP-BEZ235, a dual PI3K/mTOR inhibitor, prevents PI3K signaling and inhibits the growth of cancer cells with activating PI3K mutations.

evidence.text: mTOR signalling in cancer cells regulates G-CSF.
evidence.source: Oncogenic mTOR signaling recruits myeloid-derived suppressor cells to promote tumor initiation

evidence.text: Checkpoint kinase 2 (CHEK2) is a tumour suppressor gene.
evidence.source: Can selenium be a modifier of cancer risk in CHEK2 mutation carriers?

evidence.text: Direct pharmacological inhibition of the RAS proto-oncogene has thus far been unsuccessful.
evidence.source: Oncogenic NRAS signaling differentially regulates survival and proliferation in melanoma

evidence.text: VEGF directly and negatively regulates tumor cell invasion through enhanced recruitment of the protein tyrosine phosphatase 1B (PTP1B) to a MET/VEGFR2 heterocomplex.
evidence.source: VEGF inhibits tumor cell invasion and mesenchymal transition through a MET/VEGFR2 complex.
